name: LUNA SNOW
description: Equal parts pop star and Super Hero, Luna Snow puts on a dazzling show with both her light and dark ice powers. The arena is her stage, where Seol Hee and her team orchestrate spectacular displays that earn her an ever-increasing number of fans and wins.
lore: Luna Snow is more than just another K-Pop superstar. She's also a symbol of hope for her entire generation. Using her ice powers to keep tensions across the world cool, Luna has become a musical diplomat, ready to face any conflict that may arise. Tragedy nearly struck during Luna Snow's summer concert when a wounded Atlantean creature caused a devastating tsunami. Luna's ice held back the rushing tide and helped to heal the beast's injuries. She singlehandedly saved countless lives and prevented the situation from escalating into a full-scale conflict between South Korea and the world beneath the waves.

abilities.name: Light & Dark Ice
abilities.description: Fire ice shots that damage enemies or heal allies

stats.Casting: A triple shot that hits instantly
stats.Damage: 24 damage per round, for a total of 72 damage
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 70% at 40m
stats.Healing Amount: 24 health per round, for a total of 72 health
stats.Fire Rate: 0.5s for three shots. The interval between the first two shots is 0.05s

abilities.name: Fate of Both Worlds
abilities.description: Take center stage and start dancing! Press to toggle between two performances: Heal allies or grant them Damage Boost

stats.Casting: Persistent spell field that surrounds the caster

abilities.name: Ice Arts
abilities.description: Fire ice shards for a short duration, damaging enemies or healing allies while restoring her own Health

stats.Casting: Single-cast spell field that pierces through enemies
stats.Special Effect: Replace the previous Light & Dark Ice cast
stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 1m and a height of 40m

abilities.name: Share the Stage
abilities.description: Attach Idol Aura to an ally. Allies with Idol Aura also restore Health when Luna Snow is healing others

stats.Special Effect: Provide healing to allies marked with Idol Aura; Reduce Ice Arts cooldown by 2s whenever a hero with Idol Aura takes part in a KO

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.description: Cast a clump of ice to Freeze the hit enemy and restore Health

stats.Special Effect: Freeze enemies for 2.7s. However, if they are attacked during the last 2.2s of the freeze, the effect will be canceled. Grants 50 Bonus Health per enemy hit

abilities.name: Cryo Heart
abilities.description: Automatically restore Health when casting Ice Arts or Absolute Zero

abilities.name: Smooth Skate
abilities.description: Keep moving forward to start ice skating and enable higher jumps

abilities.name: Number One Idol
abilities.description: Boost Healing. Gain extra healing when healing others

received.name: ICED OUT DIAMOND
received.description: Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Iron Fist and Emma Frost. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi. Emma Frost can project ice energy forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies. She can also enhance her diamond form, condensing frost into an Absolute Zero Diamond barrier that blocks enemy attacks and movement

received.name: SPIRIT FOX ACCORD
received.description: White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of speed and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying Charm to enemies

base.description: Unleash a spirit fox forward that Charms enemies while healing any allies in its path. Activating the ability instantly cleanses all negative status effects on Luna Snow.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with White Fox, the spirit fox automatically returns after reaching its maximum distance, and the self-cleanse is retained.

base.description: Cast Soul Bond to tether all characters within range. Attacking tethered enemies or healing linked allies restores your Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Adam Warlock, scoring critical hits with Light & Dark Ice reduces the cooldowns of Absolute Zero and Ice Arts.
